title: Asukas fight against Zeruel
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's fight against Zeruel             Quote Post by mastervampire » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:26 am Although Zeruel was a kick ass angel, i really hate it how it defeated Asuka so quickly What ive allways wondered if what would of happened if Asuka had it fought it up close punching and kicking like Shinji? attacking from faw away with weapsons didnt work out, but maybe if she had of been hiddern then jumped on it from behind do you think it could of played out differently?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:37 am I think this belongs in Chit-Chat. The odds really were agaisnt her, Rei actually got through Zer's ATF and that was close-up. Perhaps if Asuka has been more prepared for hand to hand (er, um, ribbon) combat, and didn't lose her arms so soon, it could've lasted much longer. But for the sake of writing, they had to take her out so that they could take Rei out, so that they could bring in Shinji, so that he could get a 400% synch ratio with Sho.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:56 am She most certainly have some success if she was patient and calm. Otherwise, her rambling on of Shinji would've distracted her from actually thinking straight. Asuka would've likely thought about it, and used one of those spears adjacent to her, and with enough strength would've pierced the AT Field, or use the other weapons in her arsenal to throw as a projectile; shattering the A.T Field out of alignment.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 20, 2008 3:14 am If you haven't noticed, Asuka always rambles on about something. At least, always up untill she lost. She might as well had done this if she was going to start attacking it head on with one of the spears she had. She just picked a bad spot to attack from. Shinji only got the upper hand because he got Zer by surprise.

[]:             Quote Post by mastervampire » Sun Jan 20, 2008 3:31 am yeah thats what i ment, like if she came up from behind it and attacked close range with her knife and punches and whatever

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Sun Jan 20, 2008 10:37 am If Zer was anything like he was in the Eva2, I can understand Asuka not beating him with guns... In Eva2 guns barely put a dent in him and he's able to regenerate, so you can't kill him with guns alone. His AT field is crazy strong, it takes like, all three of my units to break through. ...Yeah, yeah. I'm basing my opinion on a video game. Right now it's my current obsession, leave me alone.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jan 20, 2008 11:05 am fadingreminder wrote: Yeah, yeah. I'm basing my opinion on a video game. Right now it's my current obsession, leave me alone.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 20, 2008 1:56 pm Zer took an N^2 mine and walked away unharmed. Think about that for a minute. Do you really think Shinji in any way hurt him until he tried to rip his face off? I don't. Shinji only got as far as he did because he caught Zer completely off-guard. Had he tried to take him head on he would have had his ass handed to him aswell.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:10 pm Zer AT Field wasn't even broken until Sho went berserk, right? I could be remembering it wrong... But I'm sure that had a lot to do with Zer being such a titan too. Granted, the N2 bomb went through the AT, I can't argue with that...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:22 pm His ATF was down when Shinji ambushed him otherwise those blows wouldn't have landed. As to why it was I dunno. It was back up when Yui said hi but it didn't last long.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:25 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: His ATF was down when Shinji ambushed him otherwise those blows wouldn't have landed. As to why it was I dunno. It was back up when Yui said hi but it didn't last long.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:29 pm The flaw with that logic is Shinji didn't beat him, Yui did. Maybe he just didn't feel threatened at the time.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jan 20, 2008 2:44 pm Shinji, Yui, Cthulhu, whoever. It doesn't matter. The point is that Zer wasn't supposed to kill everyone, so it needed to be defeated. Why it's AT Field was down is irrelevant. It's likely a plot device more than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Sun Jan 20, 2008 3:03 pm I'm sure his AT Field was "down" at the time because it was neutralized by Sho's field, maybe even down because Zer just hadn't expanded it at the time. Still, if it was neutralized, it was only because Sho was right next to it. Asuka wouldn't be able to neutralize the AT from as far away as she was.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 20, 2008 3:11 pm Aside from Matriel, when have the guns ever taken down an Angel?Ramiel in exception because that was a bad ass gun. I don't think that the guns have almost any effect at all. As for Zeruels ATF, I would assume that it was down because it saw no threats in the area, same with Matriel.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 20, 2008 5:53 pm Zer's ATF is irrelevant, Asuka still couldn't win. Save a surprise attack no one could accept another god-human. Zer was on another level plain and simple.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Jan 20, 2008 7:40 pm Yeah, I know what NERV should've done. Lure Zer onto the platform where the Evas come out, and get Eva 02 to punch him up the ass. Zer'll be on the ground, groaning. Asuka's just one of those characters who care so much about their jealousy and determination they just don't think properly and straight. Asuka would've had a chance if she just thought it straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 20, 2008 7:57 pm She was thinking straight . She was in the wrong place at the wrong time and got her ass kicked. If that were Shinji in her place, he would've gotten his ass pwned too.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 20, 2008 11:13 pm I already said taking Zer head-on would fail. He shrugged off an N^2 mine so what makes you think any generic punch has a chance in hell of hurting him? Only one of his kind had a genuine chance from the begining.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Jan 22, 2008 6:47 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I already said taking Zer head-on would fail. He shrugged off an N^2 mine so what makes you think any generic punch has a chance in hell of hurting him? Only one of his kind had a genuine chance from the begining.
